questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Mohan Rao is an electronics engineer (BE electronics) and passed out in 2004 with 66% marks. He has passed the selection test with 59% marks and is willing to pay the required amount of deposit.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: K Shiv Kumar is a student of B.Tech. in mechanical engineering and has appeared for the last semester examination. Results of the last semester examinations are expected in June 2006. He is expecting to score 65% marks in the last semester as his aggregate percentage of the first seven semester is 67%. He has passed the selection test with 60% marks and has no problem in paying the amount of ₹ 50000 as deposit. He is 22 yr old at present.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Rajeev Andhare has appeared for the last semester of engineering degree examination and is hoping to score atleast 70% marks. His aggregate score upto seventh semester is 72%. He has just completed 21 yr of age. He has scored 63% marks in the selection test and is ready to pay an amount of ₹ 50000 as deposit.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Nachiket is an engineering graduate with 75% marks at degree level. His date of birth is 16th April, 1982. He has obtained 66% marks in the selection test and is ready to pay 50% of the required amount of deposit at the time of selection and the remaining amount subsequently.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Nikita has passes out chemical engineering degree in June 2005 with 74% marks. She appeared for the selection test which she cleared with 72% marks. Her date of birth is 26th August, 1983. She is not in a position to pay ₹ 50000 but will arrange to pay ₹ 30000 as deposit.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Vinod has passed computer engineering degree examination with 68% marks in 2005 at the age of 22 yr and is working with a private engineering firm since last six months. He has cleared the selection test with 63% marks. He will manage to pay ₹ 50000 as deposit.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Aniket has appeared for the last semester examination of diploma in mechanical engineering and the results are awaited. He secured first class in each of the first 3 semesters. He has recently completed 22 yr of age. He has no problem in paying the required amount of ₹ 50000 as deposit. He has passes the selection test with 58% marks.
